generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our current reliance on foreign tech for national security actually makes us LESS safe? 🇺🇸💡 While some argue for open markets, experts warn that strategic autonomy in critical tech sectors is the only way to protect our civil liberties and deter adversaries. #NationalSecurityFirst #ThinkBeforeYouShare
